Ingredients: Protein Blend (Fermented Yeast Protein + Milk Solids), Sweetener (Maltitol), Multigrain Blend (Whole Wheat
Flour {Atta), Jowar), Edible Coconut Oil, Edible Hydrogenated Coconut Fat, Cocoa Solids (4.8%), Nature Identical Flavours &
Flavouring Substances, Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Maize Starch, Edible Common Salt, Improver Enzyme.
Storage Instructions: Store in a cool, dry and hygienic place. Changes in temperature and humidity may cause a whitish layer
to appear. This is natural and does not affect product quality.
Allergen Advice: CONTAINS MILK, SOY, CEREALS CONTAINING GLUTEN. Processed in a plant where treenuts are processed.
